# openai_group_role (Data Source)

Look up an organization-level role assignment for a group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_group_role" "example" {
  group_id = "group_123"
  role_id  = "role_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) group id
- `role_id` (String) role id

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) description
- `id` (String) id
- `name` (String) name
- `permissions` (List of String) permissions
- `predefined_role` (Boolean) predefined role
- `resource_type` (String) resource type
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.
